data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From FNB Corp. Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings Results
data.description: FNB, known for its subsidiary First National Bank, offers an annual dividend yield of 3.33%. Here's how you can earn $500 monthly.

data.title: Elevance Health's Q3 Earnings: Profit Falls Short Of Expectations On Higher Medical Costs, Issues Soft Annual Outlook
data.description: Elevance Health reported Q3 revenue of $44.7 billion, driven by higher premium yields and CarelonRx growth. However, profit fell 21%, and adjusted EPS missed expectations.

data.title: Meta To Rally Around 13%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
EXCLUSIVE: Adial Pharmaceuticals Secures Additional US Patent Expanding Intellectual Property Protection Around Its Alcohol Use Disorder Candidate
data.description: Adial Pharmaceuticals secures a new patent allowance for AD04, enhancing its precision medicine approach for treating alcohol use disorder. Topline results from AD04's latest study are expected in Q4 2024.

data.title: Spirit Airlines Struggles To Regain Altitude As Competitors Soar, Bankruptcy Concerns Intensify
data.description: Spirit Airlines (SAVE) is struggling with financial troubles and fast-tracking the retirement of its Airbus A319 fleet, raising concerns for investors about a potential bankruptcy as competitors in the airline industry soar.
